entity_description: Top-level component responsible for ingesting raw documents and transforming them into structured markdown
Handles upload validation hashing storage and queuing of incoming documents
Cleans raw markdown by removing artifacts boilerplate and normalizing whitespace
Processes embedded images and diagrams to extract structured data and descriptions
Persists raw uploaded bytes to disk with path management and cleanup
Background process that polls for uploaded documents and drives the extraction pipeline
Central communication hub for secure monitored data exchange between internal and external systems
Queue manager that enriches and routes messages to internal consumers
Converts data between JSON XML and markdown formats for cross-system communication
Token vault and authentication interceptor for all cross-boundary traffic
Service wrapper around the Ingestion Controller for API consumption
Service wrapper around the Transform Engine for external API exposure
Security audit trail service that logs all cross-boundary message traffic
External Python service for parsing PDFs Word docs and images into structured text
Open-source OCR engine used for forced text extraction on scanned documents
Corporate SAP enterprise resource planning system for financial and inventory data
External payment gateway handling Stripe and PayPal webhook events
Corporate OAuth2 and OIDC server for authentication and authorization
Memory bank service for enterprise semantic search and cross-document reasoning
Security Information and Event Management system for audit log ingestion
Capability to receive and categorize enterprise documentation by type and source
Capability to convert messy unstructured documents into clean structured markdown
Capability to store uploaded files with integrity hashing and version tracking
Capability to connect disparate internal and external systems through standard protocols
Capability to asynchronously route messages between systems with retry and dead-letter handling
Capability to transform data between JSON XML and markdown representations
Capability to authenticate and authorize all cross-boundary requests with audit trails
